step_rationale: Lipoprotein structural component; genetic variants (ε2/ε3/ε4) influence lipid metabolism and atherosclerosis susceptibility.
mechanism: Apolipoprotein E is a lipoprotein structural protein and receptor ligand whose genetic polymorphisms influence LDL metabolism, lipoprotein retention, and atherosclerosis progression and MI susceptibility.
